cases.question: Liệt kê 10 đơn hàng đầu tiên trong hệ thống theo thời gian đặt hàng?
cases.gold_sql: SELECT o.order_id, o.customer_id, o.order_status, o.order_purchase_timestamp + INTERVAL 7 HOURS AS thoi_gian_vn FROM olist_orders o ORDER BY o.order_purchase_timestamp ASC LIMIT 10
errors: generate_sql_error: 503 UNAVAILABLE. {'error': {'code': 503, 'message': 'This model is currently experiencing high demand. Spikes in demand are usually temporary. Please try again later.', 'status': 'UNAVAILABLE'}}

cases.question: Có bao nhiêu khách hàng trong hệ thống?
cases.gold_sql: SELECT COUNT(DISTINCT customer_unique_id) AS total_customers FROM olist_customers LIMIT 1
errors: generate_sql_error: 503 UNAVAILABLE. {'error': {'code': 503, 'message': 'This model is currently experiencing high demand. Spikes in demand are usually temporary. Please try again later.', 'status': 'UNAVAILABLE'}}

cases.question: Liệt kê tất cả trạng thái đơn hàng có trong hệ thống?
cases.generated_sql:
SELECT DISTINCT order_status FROM olist_orders
UNION
SELECT DISTINCT order_status FROM bronze_rt_orders_sim LIMIT 1000
cases.gold_sql: SELECT DISTINCT order_status FROM olist_orders ORDER BY order_status LIMIT 20

cases.question: Liệt kê 10 sản phẩm có nhiều ảnh nhất?
cases.generated_sql:
SELECT product_id, product_photos_qty
FROM olist_products
ORDER BY product_photos_qty DESC
LIMIT 10
cases.gold_sql: SELECT p.product_id, p.product_category_name, p.product_photos_qty FROM olist_products p ORDER BY p.product_photos_qty DESC LIMIT 10

cases.question: Liệt kê 10 người bán đầu tiên tại thành phố São Paulo (SP)?
cases.gold_sql: SELECT s.seller_id, s.seller_city, s.seller_state, s.seller_zip_code_prefix FROM olist_sellers s WHERE s.seller_state = 'SP' LIMIT 10
errors: generate_sql_error: 503 UNAVAILABLE. {'error': {'code': 503, 'message': 'This model is currently experiencing high demand. Spikes in demand are usually temporary. Please try again later.', 'status': 'UNAVAILABLE'}}

cases.question: Hiển thị thông tin 5 đánh giá có điểm thấp nhất (1 sao)?
cases.generated_sql:
SELECT r.review_id, r.order_id, r.review_score, r.review_comment_message, r.review_creation_date
FROM ai_analyst.ecommerce.olist_order_reviews r
WHERE r.review_score = 1
ORDER BY r.review_creation_date DESC
LIMIT 5
cases.gold_sql: SELECT r.review_id, r.order_id, r.review_score, r.review_comment_title, r.review_comment_message, r.review_creation_date + INTERVAL 7 HOURS AS review_creation_date_vn FROM olist_order_reviews r WHERE r.review_score = 1 ORDER BY r.review_creation_date DESC LIMIT 5

cases.question: Có bao nhiêu đơn hàng bị hủy trong hệ thống?
cases.generated_sql:
SELECT COUNT(DISTINCT order_id) AS canceled_orders
FROM olist_orders
WHERE order_status = 'canceled' LIMIT 1000
cases.gold_sql: SELECT COUNT(DISTINCT order_id) AS canceled_orders FROM olist_orders WHERE order_status = 'canceled' LIMIT 1

cases.question: Liệt kê tất cả phương thức thanh toán có trong hệ thống?
cases.generated_sql:
SELECT DISTINCT payment_type 
FROM olist_order_payments LIMIT 1000
cases.gold_sql: SELECT DISTINCT payment_type FROM olist_order_payments ORDER BY payment_type LIMIT 10

cases.question: Hiển thị 10 đơn hàng gần đây nhất theo thời gian mua (dữ liệu lịch sử)?
cases.generated_sql:
SELECT order_id, customer_id, order_status, order_purchase_timestamp
FROM olist_orders
ORDER BY order_purchase_timestamp DESC
LIMIT 10
cases.gold_sql: SELECT o.order_id, o.customer_id, o.order_status, o.order_purchase_timestamp + INTERVAL 7 HOURS AS thoi_gian_vn FROM olist_orders o ORDER BY o.order_purchase_timestamp DESC LIMIT 10

cases.question: Liệt kê tất cả danh mục sản phẩm cùng tên tiếng Anh?
cases.generated_sql:
SELECT DISTINCT p.product_category_name, t.product_category_name_english
FROM olist_products p
LEFT JOIN product_category_name_translation t ON p.product_category_name = t.product_category_name
WHERE p.product_category_name IS NOT NULL
ORDER BY p.product_category_name LIMIT 1000
cases.gold_sql: SELECT t.product_category_name, t.product_category_name_english FROM product_category_name_translation t ORDER BY t.product_category_name_english LIMIT 100

cases.question: Tổng doanh thu từ các đơn hàng đã giao thành công?
cases.generated_sql:
SELECT ROUND(SUM(oi.price), 2) AS total_revenue
FROM olist_order_items oi
JOIN olist_orders o ON oi.order_id = o.order_id
WHERE o.order_status = 'delivered' LIMIT 1000
cases.gold_sql: SELECT ROUND(SUM(oi.price), 2) AS total_revenue FROM olist_order_items oi JOIN olist_orders o ON oi.order_id = o.order_id WHERE o.order_status = 'delivered' LIMIT 1

cases.question: Số đơn hàng theo từng trạng thái?
cases.generated_sql:
SELECT order_status, COUNT(order_id) AS total_orders
FROM olist_orders
GROUP BY order_status
ORDER BY total_orders DESC LIMIT 1000
cases.gold_sql: SELECT o.order_status, COUNT(DISTINCT o.order_id) AS total_orders FROM olist_orders o GROUP BY o.order_status ORDER BY total_orders DESC LIMIT 20

cases.question: Doanh thu trung bình mỗi đơn hàng là bao nhiêu?
cases.generated_sql:
SELECT ROUND(SUM(oi.price) / COUNT(DISTINCT o.order_id), 2) AS avg_revenue_per_order
FROM olist_order_items oi
JOIN olist_orders o ON oi.order_id = o.order_id
WHERE o.order_status = 'delivered' LIMIT 1000
cases.gold_sql: SELECT ROUND(AVG(order_revenue), 2) AS avg_revenue_per_order FROM (SELECT oi.order_id, SUM(oi.price) AS order_revenue FROM olist_order_items oi JOIN olist_orders o ON oi.order_id = o.order_id WHERE o.order_status = 'delivered' GROUP BY oi.order_id) subq LIMIT 1

cases.question: Số đơn hàng theo tháng trong năm 2017?
cases.gold_sql: SELECT date_format(o.order_purchase_timestamp, 'yyyy-MM') AS month, COUNT(DISTINCT o.order_id) AS total_orders FROM olist_orders o WHERE year(o.order_purchase_timestamp) = 2017 GROUP BY date_format(o.order_purchase_timestamp, 'yyyy-MM') ORDER BY month LIMIT 20
errors: generate_sql_error: 503 UNAVAILABLE. {'error': {'code': 503, 'message': 'This model is currently experiencing high demand. Spikes in demand are usually temporary. Please try again later.', 'status': 'UNAVAILABLE'}}

cases.question: Phương thức thanh toán nào phổ biến nhất?
cases.generated_sql:
SELECT payment_type, COUNT(*) AS total_transactions, ROUND(SUM(payment_value), 2) AS total_value
FROM olist_order_payments
GROUP BY payment_type
ORDER BY total_transactions DESC
LIMIT 100
cases.gold_sql: SELECT p.payment_type, COUNT(*) AS total_transactions, ROUND(SUM(p.payment_value), 2) AS total_value FROM olist_order_payments p GROUP BY p.payment_type ORDER BY total_transactions DESC LIMIT 10

cases.question: Doanh thu theo từng quý?
cases.generated_sql:
SELECT 
  year(o.order_purchase_timestamp) AS yr, 
  quarter(o.order_purchase_timestamp) AS qtr, 
  ROUND(SUM(oi.price), 2) AS quarterly_revenue 
FROM ai_analyst.ecommerce.olist_order_items oi 
JOIN ai_analyst.ecommerce.olist_orders o ON oi.order_id = o.order_id 
WHERE o.order_status = 'delivered' 
GROUP BY year(o.order_purchase_timestamp), quarter(o.order_purchase_timestamp) 
ORDER BY yr, qtr LIMIT 1000
cases.gold_sql: SELECT year(o.order_purchase_timestamp) AS yr, quarter(o.order_purchase_timestamp) AS qtr, ROUND(SUM(oi.price), 2) AS quarterly_revenue, COUNT(DISTINCT o.order_id) AS total_orders FROM olist_order_items oi JOIN olist_orders o ON oi.order_id = o.order_id WHERE o.order_status = 'delivered' GROUP BY year(o.order_purchase_timestamp), quarter(o.order_purchase_timestamp) ORDER BY yr, qtr LIMIT 20

cases.question: Tổng phí vận chuyển theo từng bang của khách hàng?
cases.generated_sql:
SELECT c.customer_state, ROUND(SUM(oi.freight_value), 2) AS total_freight_value
FROM ai_analyst.ecommerce.olist_order_items oi
JOIN ai_analyst.ecommerce.olist_orders o ON oi.order_id = o.order_id
JOIN ai_analyst.ecommerce.olist_customers c ON o.customer_id = c.customer_id
WHERE o.order_status = 'delivered'
GROUP BY c.customer_state
ORDER BY total_freight_value DESC LIMIT 1000
cases.gold_sql: SELECT c.customer_state, ROUND(SUM(oi.freight_value), 2) AS total_freight FROM olist_order_items oi JOIN olist_orders o ON oi.order_id = o.order_id JOIN olist_customers c ON o.customer_id = c.customer_id GROUP BY c.customer_state ORDER BY total_freight DESC LIMIT 30

cases.question: Trung bình số sản phẩm (items) trong mỗi đơn hàng?
cases.gold_sql: SELECT ROUND(AVG(item_count), 2) AS avg_items_per_order FROM (SELECT order_id, COUNT(order_item_id) AS item_count FROM olist_order_items GROUP BY order_id) subq LIMIT 1
errors: generate_sql_error: 503 UNAVAILABLE. {'error': {'code': 503, 'message': 'This model is currently experiencing high demand. Spikes in demand are usually temporary. Please try again later.', 'status': 'UNAVAILABLE'}}

cases.gold_sql: SELECT r.review_score, COUNT(r.review_id) AS total_reviews FROM olist_order_reviews r GROUP BY r.review_score ORDER BY r.review_score LIMIT 10

cases.question: Tổng doanh thu và phí vận chuyển theo năm?
cases.gold_sql: SELECT year(o.order_purchase_timestamp) AS yr, ROUND(SUM(oi.price), 2) AS total_revenue, ROUND(SUM(oi.freight_value), 2) AS total_freight FROM olist_order_items oi JOIN olist_orders o ON oi.order_id = o.order_id WHERE o.order_status = 'delivered' GROUP BY year(o.order_purchase_timestamp) ORDER BY yr LIMIT 10
